_meta.how_to_regress: npm run check:golden brain-dump-buddy  (dev backend up)
_meta.note: structure case guards the do_first/actions guard fix (phantom `tasks` removed). Variable categorization arrays (decisions/tell_someone/worries/can_drop/waiting_on/someday_maybe) are [] in the golden — population varies run-to-run; keys still asserted.

input.rawThoughts: need to call the dentist, worried about the project deadline friday, buy dog food, mom birthday next week get a gift, that weird noise the car makes, cancel the streaming trial before it charges, should really answer marcus email

output.breathe: You just gave your brain permission to set everything down for a second — that took courage, and you did it.

overwhelm_meter.summary: Your brain held 7 distinct thoughts. After sorting: 4 actual tasks, 1 decision, 1 worry, and 1 feeling — way fewer than it felt like swimming around in there.
overwhelm_meter.relief: You're not drowning — you had 7 things, and the heaviest one (the project deadline) is mostly anxiety, not a missing action.

do_first.task: Cancel the streaming trial right now before you forget and it charges you.
do_first.why_this_first: It has a hard financial deadline that isn't tied to anything else, takes under 2 minutes, and getting it done gives your brain an instant win.

actions.task: Cancel the streaming trial before it charges — go directly to the app or website and cancel.
Call the dentist and book an appointment.
Reply to Marcus's email — even a short 'on it, will get back to you by [date]' counts.
Order or buy a birthday gift for mom.
actions.deadline: This week (before her birthday next week)

actions.task: Add dog food to your shopping list or order online.

feelings.feeling: General overwhelm — the sense that there's too much and no clear place to start.
feelings.validation: That feeling is real and makes complete sense, and it's worth knowing that your actual list is much shorter than it felt inside your head.

dependencies.first: Assess how serious the car noise is.
Figure out what mom would actually want as a gift.
dependencies.then: Order or buy the birthday gift.

output.closing: You've got maybe 45 minutes of actual work here — cancel that trial right now, and the rest of this list gets a whole lot less scary.
